Business: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited operates as a non-banking financial company in India. The company offers small and medium enterprises, gold, and personal loans, as well as loan against property; and credit services. The company was formerly known as Tak Machinery & Leasing Limited and changed its name to Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited in June …

  Current: 120.89  (-0.14% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
